case_title: KAREN NATOLI MAXWELL VS. WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY, FILED. ONE IS ALREADY ON FILE. PERSONAL SERVICE DONE ON APRIL 26, 2010 BY SERVING CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MAXWELL, KAREN NATOLI AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAXWELL, KAREN NATOLI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,665.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO & COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-10-2010 - UNTIMELY SERVED, CONTINUED TO MAY-24-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, NO EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
